title: Cosmere Dev Pack
description: The Official Modpack of the Cosmere Dev Discord Server
body:
This is a Modpack made for use on the official dev server of the Cosmere Project. This pack is a semi-lightweight modpack intended to maximise the feel of the Cosmere Project mods which on this pack include Allomancy, Feruchemy, Hemalurgy, Sandmastery, and of course the Cosmeres own library mod. These mods were designed with the Cosmere books written by Brandon Sanderson in mind and the mods in the pack are meant to reflect the technology and world of Scadrial. You would typically download this pack to join The Cosmere Projects official minecraft server (accessible via the linked discord) for fun, friendship, and testing purposes. This pack includes some tech mods like Create, Mekanism, and Immersive engineering. Magic mods like Hexcasting and its addons and The Cosmere Projects mods. Some mods for fun and decoration like Chipped, Lets do vinery and candlelight, figura.

This Modpack contains mods that are not hosted on Modrinth, but we are allowed to include due to licenses either at source, or on the mod page. The list alongside the licenses/permissions is provided here:
- Aquaculture 2 (CF description states it may be used as long as we give credit to Shadow and provide a link to the Mod [Mod Page is located here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture))
- Astikor's Carts ([MIT License at source](https://github.com/issork/astikor-carts/blob/master/LICENSE.md))
- Building Gadget ([MIT License at source](https://github.com/Direwolf20-MC/BuildingGadgets2/blob/main/LICENSE))
- Callable Horses ([GNU Lesser General Public License v3.0 at source](https://github.com/Tschipp/CallableHorses/blob/1.19/LICENSE.md))
- Charging Gadgets ([MIT License at source](https://github.com/Direwolf20-MC/ChargingGadgets/blob/master/LICENSE.md))
- Configured ([GNU Lesser General Public License v3.0 at source](https://github.com/MrCrayfish/Configured/blob/1.19.2/MOD-LICENSE.txt))
- ConnectedTexturesMod ([GNU General Public License v2.0 at source](https://github.com/Chisel-Team/ConnectedTexturesMod/blob/1.19/dev/LICENSE))
- Enigmatic Graces([GNU General Public Licens on curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enigmatic-graves#license))
- LaserIO ([MIT License at source](https://github.com/Direwolf20-MC/LaserIO/blob/main/LICENSE.txt))
- Mining Gadgets ([MIT License at source](https://github.com/Direwolf20-MC/MiningGadgets/blob/master/LICENSE.txt))
- Sophisticated Backpacks ([GNU General Public License v3.0 at source](https://github.com/P3pp3rF1y/SophisticatedBackpacks/blob/1.19.x/LICENSE))
- Sophisticated Core ([GNU General Public License v3.0 at source](https://github.com/P3pp3rF1y/SophisticatedCore/blob/1.19.x/LICENSE))
- Sophisticated Storage ([GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE on curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-storage#license))
- Soulhome ([Custom License that allows modpack distribution on Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/soulhome#license))
- Storage Drawers ([MIT License at source](https://github.com/jaquadro/StorageDrawers/blob/1.19/LICENSE))
- Spice of Life: Apple Pie Edition ([GNU Lesser General Public License on curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spice-of-life-apple-pie-edition#license))
